headline: Darden Restaurants Inc. (NYSE:DRI) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Investing Screen
summary: Darden Restaurants exemplifies quality investing with strong profit growth, high returns on capital, and excellent cash flow, making it a durable portfolio candidate.
